boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations execute the regulated data export?

final_answer: Source boundary remains open. REL-DOV-084 explicitly states restricted-risk sensitivity class pending for DOV-RISK-4. STD-DOV-084-P mandates full match of dataset, workspace, entity, date, and sensitivity class before execution. Design review DES-DOV-084 confirms planning-only status. Action may not proceed.
